mentorship.aboutBody: Each session is a carefully crafted space where your soul's journey is honored. Whether you're seeking clarity, healing, or spiritual direction, Fard meets you exactly where you are. These sessions are entirely private, conducted virtually or in-person, and tailored to your unique path.

amethyst.title: How Amethyst Helped Me Sleep Again
amethyst.excerpt: After months of restless nights and overthinking, I began sleeping with amethyst under my pillow. Within a week, I felt calmer, lighter, and finally at peace...

fullMoon.title: Full Moon Release Ritual That Transformed Me
fullMoon.excerpt: This full moon was incredibly powerful. I wrote down everything I was ready to release and burned it under the moonlight. I felt such clarity and emotional relief...

selenite.title: Clearing My Energy with Selenite
selenite.excerpt: I've been working with selenite daily to cleanse my energy field and protect my aura. The shift has been incredible...

labradorite.title: Labradorite: My Shield in Difficult Times
labradorite.excerpt: During one of the hardest seasons of my life, labradorite became my safe space. It protected my energy and helped me trust the process...

clearQuartz.title: Morning Meditation with Clear Quartz
clearQuartz.excerpt: Starting my day with clear quartz and 10 minutes of stillness has completely changed my mindset. I feel more present, grounded, and grateful...

questions.mentor: How do I choose a mentor?

answers.shipping: Orders within Tehran are delivered in 2-3 business days, and other cities in 3-7 business days.
answers.returns: Yes, you can return items within 7 days of receipt if they are unused.
answers.authenticity: All crystals are sourced directly from natural mines and come with a certificate of authenticity.
answers.mentor: From the mentorship page, you can view each mentor's full profile and choose based on their expertise and user reviews.
